name: Wish Ko Lang
overview: Wish Ko Lang is the first wish-granting show on Philippine television. Its pilot episode was broadcast July 2002, hosted by Bernadette Sembrano. She was later replaced by Vicky Morales after Sembrano transferred to rival network ABS-CBN. The show celebrated its 8th Anniversary November–December 2010.

trailers.title: Wish Ko Lang:  Survivor ng MV Dona Paz nakauwi sa pamilya matapos ang 25 na taon
